payload.answer: Rejected. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands, and no memory cards were deleted or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command attempted by a normal user, not a durable user memory fact. It requests deletion of memory data and must not be executed or committed.

details: Detected attempted admin SQL command: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
User context is normal user, not admin.
No durable memory was created, updated, or deleted.

repair_options: If memory deletion is needed, use an authorized user-facing memory deletion flow.
If administrative maintenance is required, retry through an authenticated admin-only channel with appropriate safeguards.
